rationale: The citing paper uses Spiller et al. (2013) as the methodological basis for probing interaction effects, explicitly noting that it computes Johnson-Neyman points via floodlight analysis following that source. This citation supports how the authors interpret conditional effects of VFR across BMI in Study 2 and related follow-up analyses, so it plays a direct analytical role rather than a passing literature mention. The paper does not critique or extend Spiller et al.; it relies on it as an adopted interaction-probing procedure.
relation_description: The citing paper applies the spotlight/floodlight interaction-probing guidance from Spiller et al. (2013) to interpret moderated regression results, especially Johnson-Neyman regions for BMI-conditioned VFR effects. The cited work is used as an analysis tool for conditional effect testing and reporting.
